title: Digest — Mar 20, 2026, 07:49 PM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog Digest

Hello Dwarf Enthusiasts! We've made some exciting updates since our last digest. Here’s a summary of the changes:

## New Features
- **Inventory Modal**: 
  - We've replaced the outdated ResourceCounter in the toolbar with a new **Inventory** button. 
  - Now, you can easily view your **Stockpile** items (uncarried and organized by category) and see what’s being carried by each dwarf in a simple modal.

## Fixes & Improvements
- **Gender Assignment for Starting Dwarves**: 
  - Fixed a bug that caused all starting dwarves to have a null gender. They will now be assigned a gender randomly during embarkation.
  
- **Deduplication of Blog Posts**: 
  - Resolved an issue with our hourly digest that caused duplicate PR entries. Uncovered posts have been cleaned up for a clearer overview.
  
- **Missing Digest Posts Backfilled**: 
  - We've also added back a missing digest post covering PRs #352 to #368 from a previous period. This ensures no important updates have been overlooked.
  
- **Digest Push and Polling Enhancements**: 
  - Improved the digest workflow so it respects explicit lookback_minutes when triggered. Now, it will push updates more frequently (every 5 minutes) and will ignore paths to the blog during CI checks.

With these updates, we're paving the way for a smoother and more enjoyable experience in managing your dwarf colony. Thanks for your continued support and happy digging!

## Merged PRs
- #465
- #463
- #469
- #468
- #461
- #467

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (10 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 176
- **Avg stress:** 67.4
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths
